hero.title: Translate and Understand Research Papers Instantly
hero.subtitle: No Upload, No Signup, 100% Private
hero.description: Translate, summarize, and read English research papers in seconds. Built for students and researchers who need to understand academic PDFs faster. Free to try.

privacy.title: 100% Private
privacy.description: Files never leave your browser. All processing happens locally on your device.

free.title: Always Free
free.description: No hidden fees, no subscription required. Use all tools completely free.

noSignup.title: No Signup Needed
noSignup.description: Start using any tool instantly. No account, no email required.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, 100%. All PDF processing happens directly in your browser using JavaScript. Your files never get uploaded to any server. We literally cannot see your files.
faq.a2: Yes, all tools are completely free. There are no hidden fees, no subscription plans, and no usage limits.
faq.a3: The maximum file size depends on your browser and device memory. Most modern browsers can handle files up to 500MB without issues.
faq.q4: Do I need to install anything?
faq.a4: No installation required. Everything works directly in your web browser on any device.
faq.a5: All modern browsers are supported: Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge, and Opera.
faq.a6: Yes! We are actively working on more tools including PDF to Word, Word to PDF, and more. Stay tuned.

footer.tagline: Free PDF tools that respect your privacy.

steps.step1Desc: Select or drag your PDF file
steps.step2Desc: We process it in your browser

pdfToWord.title: PDF to Word Converter
pdfToWord.subtitle: Extract text from PDF and convert to an editable Word document
pdfToWord.note: This tool extracts text content from your PDF. Complex layouts, images, and formatting may not be fully preserved.
pdfToWord.noText: No text content was found in this PDF. It may be a scanned or image-based document.

wordToPdf.title: Word to PDF Converter
wordToPdf.subtitle: Convert Word documents to PDF format instantly
wordToPdf.docWarning: The .doc format has limited support. If conversion fails, please save as .docx first.
wordToPdf.docNotSupported: The old .doc format is not supported. Please save it as .docx in Microsoft Word (File → Save As → .docx) and try again.
wordToPdf.invalidFile: Please select a Word document (.docx or .doc).

aiFeatures.title: AI Paper Reader
aiFeatures.subtitle: More than translation — true understanding of academic papers

summary.title: Instant Understanding
summary.desc: Highlight any passage and get a plain-language explanation instantly. No more struggling with academic jargon.

translate.title: Three Understanding Modes
translate.desc: Academic translation (precise), plain explanation (in simple words), and rewrite suggestions (for your own citations).

qa.title: Ask & Follow Up
qa.desc: Still confused? Ask follow-up questions about any part of the paper. The AI answers in your language, based on the paper.

aiPaper.title: AI Paper Reader
aiPaper.subtitle: Upload any academic paper and understand it instantly. Highlight any passage for plain-language explanations, academic translations, and rewrite suggestions.

upload.title: Drop your academic paper here
upload.subtitle: PDF format, up to 20 MB
upload.privacy: Your PDF is processed locally. Only the text you select is sent to AI.
upload.feature3: Ask Any Question About Your Paper

aiPaper.limitDesc: You've reached today's limit (30 questions). Come back tomorrow!

chat.title: Ask about this paper
chat.placeholder: Ask a question about this paper...

step1.title: Upload Your Paper
step1.desc: Drop any academic PDF. We support papers from all fields and publishers.

step2.title: Highlight & Explain
step2.desc: Select any text in the paper. AI instantly explains it in plain language, translates it, or rewrites it for your use.

step3.title: Ask & Understand
step3.desc: Still confused? Ask follow-up questions. AI answers based on the paper, in your language.

pricing.title: Unlock Unlimited AI Paper Understanding
pricing.subtitle: Each paper costs us ~$0.30 to process with advanced AI — we keep prices low so every researcher can afford it.
